title: Encasa XO ZZ Cream Jacquard Shower Curtain 183 Drop | Mould Proof & Mildew Resistant Waterproof | Bathroom Curtains With 10 Hooks | Easy Installation| Quick-Drying Curtains| 180x180 cm (72x72 in)
features: WATERPROOF - Made of heavier polyester fabric with a size 180x180 cm, this shower curtain will surely last for many showers. The water-resistant finish helps keep the rest of your bathroom dry.
EASY TO INSTALL - Includes 10 plastic hooks that fit most standard shower curtain rods, making it easy to install in minutes
KEEP YOUR PRIVACY - This 6 feet long shower curtain creates a partition and provides the perfect level of privacy while in the shower. No need to worry about someone barging in on you!
EASY TO COORDINATE - The neutral color allows this shower curtain to coordinate easily with any bathroom décor
MACHINE WASHABLE - Keep your shower curtain clean and fresh by simply throwing it in the washing machine!
